posts.highlight: 草莓午睡 · 抱着玩具睡着了
posts.description: Strawberry the Bichon napping while hugging a stuffed animal friend, peaceful and angelic
posts.description_zh: 草莓比熊抱着玩具睡着了，安静的小天使，画面太治愈
posts.caption_en:
아기 낮잠시간이에요 😴🌙 친구 꼭 껴안고 자는 천사가나디 🍼 (Baby nap time 😴🌙 Sleeping while hugging a friend like an angel 🍼)

#귀여운강아지 #아기비숑 #비숑딸기 #cutedog
posts.caption_zh:
宝宝午睡时间到啦 😴🌙 抱着小朋友睡着的天使🍼

#可爱狗狗 #比熊草莓
posts.westie_prompt: A West Highland White Terrier, pure white fluffy fur, bright eyes, small black nose. Scene inspired by: Strawberry the Bichon napping while hugging a stuffed animal friend, peaceful and angelic. Natural lighting, photorealistic, square composition, no text, no watermark.

posts.description: Korean fluffy dog (Bichon-type) with dumb-cute expression, just staring blankly at the camera
posts.description_zh: 韩系蓬松狗狗空洞看镜头，傻乎乎的表情让人忍不住喊它大傻瓜
posts.caption_zh: 大傻瓜🤍 就这么傻傻看着你

posts.highlight: 草莓的侧颜 · 美到发疯
posts.description: Strawberry the Bichon shot from the side profile, impossibly cute fluffy face
posts.description_zh: 草莓比熊的侧颜特写，蓬松白毛和小巧侧脸可爱到让人心跳漏一拍
posts.caption_en:
야르한 옆태 미치겠네 ㅠㅋㅋㅋ (This side profile is killing me ㅠㅋㅋㅋ)

#귀여운강아지 #아기비숑 #cutedogreels #puppy #cutedog
posts.caption_zh:
这侧颜真的把我迷得神魂颠倒 ㅠㅋㅋㅋ

posts.highlight: 33岁生日在巴厘岛 · 十年影像纪录
posts.description: Documentary photographer Jord Hammond celebrates birthday in Bali, reflecting on a decade of island life and photography
posts.description_zh: 纪录片摄影师 Jord 在巴厘岛庆祝生日，回望十年岛屿生活与影像创作历程
posts.caption_en: Another lap around the sun, completed! When I first arrived in Bali, I never imagined I'd still be here nearly a decade later, camera in hand, documenting daily life across the island.
posts.caption_zh: 又绕了太阳一圈！第一次来巴厘岛时，没想到十年后我还在这里，手持相机记录这座岛屿的日常。
posts.westie_prompt: A West Highland White Terrier, pure white fluffy fur, bright eyes, small black nose. Scene inspired by: Documentary photographer Jord Hammond celebrates birthday in Bali, reflecting on a decade of island life and photography. Natural lighting, photorealistic, square composition, no text, no watermark.
